# hetzner-robot_subnet_mac (Resource)

Manages a virtual MAC (vMAC) for a subnet (`PUT` / `DELETE /subnet/{ip}/mac`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Generate a virtual MAC (vMAC) for a subnet.
resource "hetzner-robot_subnet_mac" "net" {
  subnet_ip = "2a01:4f8:1:2::"
}
```

Import an existing vMAC by subnet IP:

```shell
terraform import hetzner-robot_subnet_mac.net 2a01:4f8:1:2::
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `subnet_ip` (String) Subnet network IP

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `mac` (String) The generated virtual MAC
